alt_forms.note: Fully neutral alternative meaning obstacle/impediment. Used in JWC documentation. No WH association.

definitions.gloss_en: terrain or a unit that screens or obstructs, providing a defensive bonus to units behind it
definitions.gloss_jp: {ユニット|ゆにっと}や{地|ち}{形|けい}が{射|しゃ}{線|せん}を{部|ぶ}{分|ぶん}{的|てき}に{遮|さえぎ}り、{防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}ボーナスを{与|あた}える
definitions.explanation_en: A terrain element or intervening unit that partially blocks line of sight, granting a defensive or saving modifier to the covered unit.
definitions.implicit_notes: ⚠️ WH*: 遮蔽 appears in WH40K Japan as 遮蔽物 (cover object) and 遮蔽物ボーナス (cover bonus). However, 遮蔽 is a standard Japanese architectural and military term meaning to screen/obstruct, predating Warhammer by centuries.
definitions.orthography_notes: 遮蔽: 遮 (block/obstruct) + 蔽 (cover/conceal). Classical Japanese architectural and military term. Goo dictionary lists it as a standard word. The WH concern is the specific compound 遮蔽物ボーナス, not 遮蔽 itself. 障害 is the fully neutral alternative if caution is preferred.
definitions.game_setting_notes: ⚠️ WH*: Use with awareness that 遮蔽物 compounds appear in WH Japan. 遮蔽 alone is classical and low-risk. 障害 (obstacle) is the fully neutral alternative used in JWC terrain rules.

usage_jp: {遮|しゃ}{蔽|へい}を{利|り}{用|よう}する (use cover); {遮|しゃ}{蔽|へい}ボーナス (cover bonus)
comparative_notes: 遮蔽物ボーナス is the WH Japan compound; 遮蔽 alone is classical. 障害 (shougai, obstacle) is the recommended fully neutral alternative that avoids any WH association.

examples.japanese: {遮|しゃ}{蔽|へい}に{隠|かく}れたユニットは{防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}ボーナスを{得|え}る。
examples.english: Units in cover gain a defensive bonus.

cross_references.note: 地形 — terrain category that 遮蔽 belongs to
射線 — line of sight reduced by 遮蔽
防御 — the stat modified by 遮蔽 bonus
